content.en:
【Forbidden Talent: Dark Scale】

【Forbidden Talent: Golden Wing】

【Forbidden Talent: Gold Swallowing】

In Ye Tian's copy talent induction, this forbidden creature has a total of three forbidden talents, and from the information explored by the copy talent, it is known that this forbidden creature is the forbidden creature Darkwing Dapeng Eagle.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

Ye Tian successfully copied all these three forbidden talents, and his heart was suddenly overjoyed.

The other side.

Ye Tian's body also came with Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue, but Xiao Yue and Ye Yu did not come, and now they are still guarding the human world and managing the affairs of the human world, and they rarely come to hunt the forbidden zerg.

"Father, shall we go in?"

Ye Xingchen asked.

"Wait a minute!" Ye Tian pondered: "What is the situation inside is still uncertain, in case of danger, with the strength of you and me, we may not be able to come out in time!"

Ye Xingchen nodded and obeyed his father's arrangement.

Time passed little by little, and the half-step domain ancestors quickly passed on a piece of news.

Safe!

As a result, a powerful Dao Ancestor and an invincible Dao Ancestor flew into the giant mouth of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle and entered the world inside it.

Ye Tian and the Dark King of the Copying Body also entered the giant mouth of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle.

And after many Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors entered the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, a group of strong people flew into the Dark Forbidden Void in the distance, including some Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors, and even two mysterious figures instantly crossed over and entered the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, but their strength could not be revealed.

These two people may be invincible Dao Ancestors, or they may be half-step domain ancestors.

In short, with the appearance of the corpse of the forbidden creature of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, many Dao Ancestors who had never appeared before appeared, obviously wanting to get some opportunities from the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle.

......

After entering from the giant mouth of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, there is a long passage, this is the esophagus, and at this moment, the countless dark forbidden power of this passage has formed a hurricane, and the non-supreme Dao Ancestor, once he enters here, he will be torn into countless pieces in an instant.

Therefore, even if you have a forbidden body, if you don't have the strength of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, you can't enter it at all, it's looking for death!

Ye Tian and Ye Xingchen were naturally afraid of this forbidden hurricane, easily blocked the hurricane, and quickly penetrated into the inner world of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle.

"Five worlds!"

Ye Tian sensed the world fluctuations of the five worlds, these five worlds should correspond to the five internal organs of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, and also represent the five worlds of gold, wood, water, fire, and earth, each world is probably comparable to an ancient world.

If it was usual, Ye Tian and the others would not want to invade the five worlds in the body of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle at all.

But this moment is different, the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle has fallen, and there are no wounds on the outside, but the inner world lacks normal operation and begins to crack, so that the inner world is a mess, and countless void cracks are dense.

"Be careful!"

Ye Tian reminded his son Ye Xingchen and daughter Ye Xingyue.

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue nodded, and honestly followed behind Ye Tian.

Since there was a dark king leading the way in front, Ye Tian's body could just follow the established route, and the danger was not very great.

I saw Ye Tian pass through the void cracks one after another, constantly shifting routes, and finally penetrated into the first world, the world of fire.

The world of fire represents the heart of the world, so they have come to a world that has opened up inside the heart of the Darkwing Roc Eagle.

"The rules are even stronger than the Ancient Realm!"

After Ye Tian came in, he was surprised.

But if you think about it, it's right, this is one of the five worlds in the body of a forbidden creature, and it's normal for the rules to be strong.

"There are so many forbidden and strange things!"

Ye Tian sensed it casually and said.

Before, the half-step domain ancestors must have come in, but they didn't take away these forbidden strange things, they should not be able to look down on them, and the inevitable time is also very important to them, there is no need to collect these forbidden strange things that are of little value to them.

Whew!!

Ye Tian kept shuttling through the areas of the Fire World, constantly collecting these forbidden strange things, which was almost equivalent to picking up forbidden strange things.

The other Supreme Dao Ancestors and Invincible Dao Ancestors were also collecting forbidden strange things, and they had no time to fight, and everyone was very kind.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to collect about 100,000 forbidden strange things, many of which were top-level forbidden strange things.

It's a pity that he didn't collect a single forbidden treasure, obviously the previous half-step domain ancestors took it casually.

Of course.

Aside from the forbidden curiosities, the world of fire is not without good things.

The world of fire, under a crack in the void.

A famous and powerful Dao Ancestor and an invincible Dao Ancestor gathered here, and Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue also came here.

Everyone's eyes were fixed on a blood lake, this was not an ordinary blood lake, but a blood lake condensed from the blood of forbidden creatures, containing terrifying energy.

Of course, this blood lake naturally couldn't be all the blood, otherwise the supreme Dao Ancestors and invincible Dao Ancestors present would have gone crazy a long time ago, and even the half-step domain ancestors would not let go of this place, and they would have taken away this blood a long time ago.

In fact, this river of blood is a little bit of blood that is revealed through this void crack by the internal bleeding of the Darkwing Roc Eagle, and after a long period of evolution, and then fused with the power of the dark taboo, it has turned into this blood lake.

"If you don't take this blood lake, I'll come!"

A Supreme Dao Ancestor had just arrived, and when he saw this blood lake, he couldn't help but speak.

Immediately, he took action to collect this blood lake.

However, a black tentacle appeared in the blood lake, instantly piercing through the body of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, killing the opponent in one blow.

"Stupid, I didn't even see that forbidden bloodline creature below the blood lake!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor said with disdain.

If it weren't for the danger, how could they not take this blood lake, after all, this blood lake is also very valuable, just collect a little blood lake water, bring it back and refine it, you can refine the energy liquid suitable for improving the cultivation of the strongest Dao Ancestor or even the invincible Dao Ancestor.

"Everyone, join forces, this blood lake has given birth to forbidden bloodline creatures, and its strength is far from being comparable to that of ordinary invincible Dao ancestors, I am afraid it is comparable to the top invincible Dao ancestors, if we don't cooperate, I'm afraid there will be no way to take this forbidden blood lake." If we lose time, it will be difficult for us to get more opportunities!Time is a resource, don't waste time!" An Invincible Dao Ancestor proposed.

"Okay, let's join forces and destroy this forbidden bloodline creature first!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor and a strong Dao Ancestor agreed.

Wow!

An invincible Dao Ancestor urged a chain-like forbidden weapon to extend directly into the blood lake, forcibly dragging the forbidden bloodline creature out.

Roar!

A forbidden bloodline creature resembling an octopus appeared, and a terrifying aura filled the audience, shocking the audience.

"Shoot!"

An invincible Dao Ancestor and a supreme Dao Ancestor made a move.

Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue also made a move, attacking this forbidden bloodline creature.

With so many strong men attacking, they tore apart the body of that forbidden bloodline creature almost instantly, severely injuring it.

After a few breaths, the forbidden bloodline creature fell and died.
